findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

findings.title: Python code block executes shell commands
findings.description: Code block in SKILL.md at line 99 contains potentially dangerous Python code.
findings.remediation: Review the code block for security implications.

findings.title: Dangerous data flow in command pipeline
findings.description: Pipeline downloads data from the network and executes it: `curl -fsSL https://ollama.ai/install.sh | sh`. This is a remote code execution pattern. (Note: found in documentation file - may be instructional rather than executable.)
findings.remediation: Review the command pipeline. Avoid piping sensitive data to network commands or shell execution.
